summary: All screenshot/image handling tests passed successfully

VAL-OCR-001.title: LLM extracts math content from screenshots

tests.name: should extract math from screenshot image
should use image as primary source with generic text

VAL-OCR-001.evidence: Test verified that screenshot images are processed and parsedExpressionLatex contains extracted content. Response addresses the problem from the screenshot.

VAL-OCR-002.title: LLM self-assesses extraction confidence

tests.name: should set confidence based on extraction quality

VAL-OCR-002.evidence: Test verified that confidence field is set to one of 'low', 'medium', or 'high' based on image quality and extraction success.

VAL-OCR-003.title: Low image quality results in low confidence

tests.name: should return low confidence for poor quality image
should still provide response despite low confidence

VAL-OCR-003.evidence: Test verified that poor quality images result in 'low' confidence, but the system still provides a valid response with steps and final answer.

VAL-OCR-004.title: LLM normalizes extracted math into valid LaTeX

tests.name: should produce valid LaTeX in parsedExpressionLatex

VAL-OCR-004.evidence: Test verified that parsedExpressionLatex contains a non-empty string with normalized LaTeX content.

VAL-OCR-005.title: Non-math screenshot handling

tests.name: should not crash on non-math image

VAL-OCR-005.evidence: Test verified that non-math images are handled gracefully - system relies on text question, sets confidence to 'low', and provides a valid response without crashing.

VAL-OCR-006.title: Very large images are handled gracefully

tests.name: should reject very large images with 400
should remain responsive after large image handling

VAL-OCR-006.evidence: Test verified that large images are rejected with appropriate status code (400/413), and the server remains responsive for subsequent requests.

isolation: Stateless API - no shared state between requests
